terminology.SummarizedItem: Frozen output model SummarizedItem(raw, summary) consumed by S5
terminology.content_hash: SHA-256 hex of title+'\n'+body (post-truncation, 8000 char cap); last cache-key segment
terminology.graceful-degradation: catch+log+skip-item+continue on LLM failure; never abort the run
terminology.best-effort-cache: Redis get/set failure treated as miss/no-op, never crashes the pipeline
terminology.LiteLLMSummarizer: Concrete LLMClient adapter; completion injected; cache-aside + normalize + batch skip inside
terminology.summarize_items: Adapter-only batch helper ->list[SummarizedItem] owning skip-log-continue (ADR-005); NOT on Protocol
terminology.SummarizationFailed: Raised by normalize_summary on empty LLM output → item skipped, never cached (EC-012)
terminology._SkipItem: Private sentinel raised for fully-empty items (AC-4-018); caught inside summarize_items only
terminology.openai.APIError: The actual common base of all litellm exceptions at runtime (DEV-001)
